features.title: Tiingo adapter + SnapshotLoader Repository 抽象
features.acceptance: (1) 新建 workbench_api/data/__init__.py + snapshot_loader.py：抽象基类 SnapshotLoader (vendor-agnostic) + dataclass PriceBar (含 PIT semantics docstring)；(2) 新建 workbench_api/data/tiingo_loader.py：TiingoSnapshotLoader 继承 SnapshotLoader；使用 httpx；api_key 从 os.environ['TIINGO_API_KEY'] 读；缺时 raise RuntimeError 含修复指引；BASE_URL = 'https://api.tiingo.com/tiingo'；Authorization header 'Token {api_key}'；(3) fetch_daily_bars(ticker, from_date, to_date)：HTTP GET Tiingo /tiingo/daily/{ticker}/prices?startDate={from}&endDate={to}&format=json + parse 响应 → list[PriceBar] (Tiingo JSON schema: date/open/high/low/close/adjClose/volume)；处理 5xx / rate limit / network fail (重试 3 次 + backoff + 报 alert log)；(4) health_check()：GET /tiingo/daily/spy/prices?startDate={yesterday}；返回 True/False；(5) 不动现有 trade/data/loader.py (fixture) + 不切任何 strategy 数据源 (B028+ 责任)；(6) workbench_api/config.py 加 TIINGO_API_KEY 读取；(7) .env.example 加 '# Tiingo Starter \$10/月 API key for B027+ real data ingest (https://api.tiingo.com/account/api/token)' TIINGO_API_KEY=；(8) deploy.sh 加 pre-flight check：if -z TIINGO_API_KEY then echo missing && exit 1 (不阻塞 B021-B026 部署，仅 B027 deploy 时验)；(9) pytest 新增 ≥10 测试：SnapshotLoader 抽象 instantiation 失败 / TiingoSnapshotLoader 缺 API key raise RuntimeError / mock httpx Tiingo JSON response fetch_daily_bars 解析正确 (含 adjClose 字段) / mock 5xx 3 次重试 + alert / mock 429 rate limit 重试 + backoff / health_check happy + auth fail (401) / PriceBar dataclass frozen + slots / PIT semantic edge (to_date 未来限到今天) / Tiingo 响应 missing adjClose ValueError 含 context / 多 ticker 顺序 fetch (保持 < 60/hour)；(10) Gates: pytest tests ≥320 baseline + ≥10 = ≥330 / ruff exit=0 / mypy workbench_api tests exit=0 / frontend 不动 不破 vitest ≥166；(11) 不动 B024 i18n / B025 us_quality_momentum / B026 banner / DB schema (cost log 表在 F002 加) / strategy / Master Portfolio / Recommendations / Risk Panel / Frontend UI；不引入 Tiingo Python SDK (避 vendor lock-in，走 httpx 直接 REST)。

features.title: Cost guard + budget log + Production secret deploy
features.acceptance: (1) 新建 workbench_api/data/cost_guard.py：MonthlyBudgetGuard dataclass (cap=10.0 / threshold=0.80 / estimated_cost_per_call=0.00005) + check_and_increment() + BudgetExceeded exception；(2) 新建 workbench_api/repositories/budget_log.py：SQLite 表 tiingo_budget_log (date PK, month_year TEXT, call_count INT, total_cost_usd_est REAL) + CRUD: get_month_total_calls(date) / increment(date)；(3) alembic migration add_tiingo_budget_log_table.py：CREATE TABLE (参考 B022 模式)；不破既有 schema；(4) TiingoSnapshotLoader.__init__ 接收 guard: MonthlyBudgetGuard | None (默认 .default())；fetch_daily_bars 入口调 guard.check_and_increment()；(5) /api/debug/recent-errors (B022 既有) 确认能捕获 tiingo_budget_near_cap warning + BudgetExceeded raise log；(6) GitHub repo Settings 加 TIINGO_API_KEY secret (Planner 在 spec lock 时已确认用户注册 Tiingo Starter 账号 + 拿 key 流程；secret 配置由 Generator 在实施时通过 user 协助完成)；(7) deploy.sh 同 F001 (8) 已加 pre-flight；F002 加额外 schema-assert (v0.9.25 §12.6) 确认 tiingo_budget_log 表存在；(8) pytest 新增 ≥10 测试：MonthlyBudgetGuard.default() 默认值正确 (cap=10.0/threshold=0.80) / check_and_increment() 月内首次通过 / 接近 80% log warning (capture log) / ≥100% raise BudgetExceeded / budget_log SQLite CRUD (fixture DB) / 月份切换 5→6 calls 归零 / alembic up/down (在 fixture DB) / TiingoSnapshotLoader 集成 cost_guard (mock guard.check_and_increment → fetch_daily_bars 成功 / BudgetExceeded → 不调 HTTP) / BudgetExceeded 异常含修复指引文本 / tiingo_budget_log 表 schema 一致性 assert；(9) Gates: pytest tests ≥340 passed / ruff + mypy 清 / alembic up/down 在 fixture DB 验证 / Frontend 不动；(10) 不动 F001 已完成的接口 / 其他 backend endpoint / strategy 代码。

features.title: Codex L1 + L2 真 VM 验收 + signoff
features.acceptance: L1 (CI 内): F001 + F002 全 generator 验收脚本跑通 — backend pytest ≥340 / ruff / mypy / alembic up-down OK；Frontend 不动 vitest ≥166 + Playwright ≥33 不破；safety regression 全绿；grep 整 build artifact + log 文件搜 TIINGO_API_KEY value 0 命中。L2 (真 VM): (1) Generator 实施期间已在 GitHub repo Settings 加 TIINGO_API_KEY secret (用户协助)；deploy workflow inject 成功；(2) Production VM cat /etc/workbench/.env.production | grep TIINGO_API_KEY 存在 (值脱敏)；(3) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/health 返回 200 + version SHA 与 main HEAD 等价；(4) curl https://trade.guangai.ai/api/debug/recent-errors 返回 {"count":0,"records":[]}；(5) Production backend log (systemd journal) 含 alembic migration add_tiingo_budget_log_table 成功记录；(6) SSH 到 VM 跑 sqlite3 ... 'SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type=table AND name=tiingo_budget_log' 返回 1 行；(7) smoke API test (Evaluator 临时跑一次)：production backend 触发一次 TiingoSnapshotLoader.health_check() → Tiingo 返回 200 / budget_log 增 1 行；(8) Production HEAD ≡ main HEAD (v0.9.25 §Production/HEAD 等价性) + Post-signoff Deploy 段 (v0.9.27)；(9) B026 banner 仍 enable 显示 (确认不被本批次影响)。Signoff: docs/test-reports/B027-real-data-snapshot-foundation-signoff-2026-MM-DD.md 用 framework/templates/signoff-report.md (v0.9.27/v0.9.28 模板含 §Production/HEAD 等价性 + §Post-signoff Deploy 双段)；docs/screenshots/B027-snapshot-foundation/ ≥2 PNG (production /api/health 响应 + tiingo_budget_log 表存在)。Framework 候选：预期无重大；若 fix-round 出现 cost guard race / secret 注入失败等意外，按 v0.9.X 模式记录 signoff §Framework Learnings。更新 progress.json status→done / docs.signoff / evaluator_feedback。
